# PassiveAggressiveEmails.com

## Summary
PassiveAggressiveEmails.com is a free online tool and content library for generating passive-aggressive workplace emails. It features a 6-point tone scale from "Professional" to "Corporate Assassin" and covers 8 workplace categories.

## Core Feature
The Passive Aggressive Email Generator creates workplace emails based on:
- Recipient type (Manager, Client, Supplier, Coworker, Employee, Freelancer)
- Situation (150+ preset scenarios or custom input)
- Tone level (1-6 scale)
- Length (Short, Medium, Long)

## Output Includes
- Email subject line and body
- Aggression score (0-100)
- Damage assessment
- Corporate translation (what you mean vs. what you write)

## Tone Scale
1. Professional - Genuinely polite
2. Slightly Annoyed - Smile is slipping
3. Concerned - Patience wearing thin
4. Passive Aggressive - Classic corporate subtext
5. Per My Previous Email - Gloves coming off
6. Corporate Assassin - Career-ending precision

## Categories
- Clients
- Coworkers
- Managers
- Suppliers
- Meetings
- Deadlines
- Invoices
- Corporate Buzzwords
